title: Kebab
body:
# Kebab
This mod adds kebabs to minecraft!

You have to right click with raw beef in hand on the kebab machine to put it inside. Right click on the kebab machine to turn it on. Wait about 10 seconds for the meat to be done. Right click on the kebab machine with Farmer's Delight knifes to get the kebab meat.

There is a lot planned, the first versions will be very basic, when ill have time ill work on it :)
# Dependencies
[GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
